arts.ttl: Mega money on the table: Liverpool ‘trying everything to convince’ 26-year-old Real Madrid target
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold has been linked with a move away from the club. Real Madrid are keen on securing his services and the 26-year-old will be out of contract at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Liverpool ace set for Galatasaray switch thanks to Brazilian connection
arts.sum: Alisson Becker is expected to leave Liverpool at the end of the 2024/25 campaign, and a Brazilian connection could see him move to Turkish side Galatasaray.
